## [06:08 - 09:07]

give people options in the bot and we keep the conversation going now the other scenario is to recover a user and this is what happens quite a lot when you start building your bot and you get traffic through is people do not always do what you want them to do no matter how explicitly you ask them to tap a button but they then still type a reply now in this scenario the smart delay is going to help you to recover that user now let's say we're going to ask the user how many units who units would you like to order order tap on the buttons below pretty straightforward but all will happen instead of people tapping the button they will type one or they will type two or they will type three or they type 10 whatever it will happen trust me now in this scenario if that happens if somebody would not tap one of these buttons they will type an answer which will trigger most likely it will trigger depending on how you set it up the default reply and the default reply it would probably say something as hey thank you for reaching out we'll be back we'll be in touch within the next 24 hours whatever click here to do anything you want and we'll dive into the default reply in a separate video now this is when your flow comes to a grinding halt because it is set up to move forward based on a button action or a button a tap on a button an actual an action instead of a user input now this is where the smart delay comes in so what we do is what we should do is somebody taps one taps two taps three whatever taps a quick reply button we add a tag this tag could be something like uh answered question one great now we're going to wait for one minute and then we're going to look if the tag is missing so if the tag answered question one is missing we know they didn't answer this question so or they didn't answer the question or they type something either way the flow came to a halt and this is where we then want to send them a message to recover them
